full_description: FocusFlow is a productivity app designed to help you stay focused and avoid distractions. It provides a range of features to boost your productivity, including a Pomodoro timer, task management, and website blocking. With FocusFlow, you can prioritize your tasks, set goals, and track your progress. The Pomodoro timer helps you work in focused 25-minute increments, followed by a 5-minute break. The task management feature allows you to create and manage your to-do lists, set reminders, and track your progress. The website blocking feature helps you avoid distractions by blocking social media, email, and other non-essential websites. FocusFlow also provides detailed statistics and insights to help you understand your productivity habits and identify areas for improvement. Download FocusFlow today and start achieving your goals!
